:root {
    /* Container */
    --container-max-width: 100%;
    --container-xxs-max-width: 27.5rem; /* 440px */
    --container-xs-max-width: 42.5rem; /* 680px */
    --container-sm-max-width: 61.25rem; /* 980px */
    --container-md-max-width: 71.875rem; /* 1150px */
    --container-lg-max-width: 78.75rem; /* 1260px */
    --container-xl-max-width: 85rem; /* 1360px */
    --container-gutter: 1.25rem;

    --section-vertical-spacing: 2.5rem;
    --section-vertical-spacing-tight:2.5rem;

    --section-stack-gap:2.25rem;
    --section-stack-gap-tight:2.25rem;

    /* Form settings */
    --form-gap: 1.25rem; /* Gap between fieldset and submit button */
    --fieldset-gap: 1rem; /* Gap between each form input within a fieldset */
    --form-control-gap: 0.625rem; /* Gap between input and label (ignored for floating label) */
    --checkbox-control-gap: 0.75rem; /* Horizontal gap between checkbox and its associated label */
    --input-padding-block: 0.65rem; /* Vertical padding for input, textarea and native select */
    --input-padding-inline: 0.8rem; /* Horizontal padding for input, textarea and native select */
    --checkbox-size: 0.875rem; /* Size (width and height) for checkbox */

    /* Other sizes */
    --sticky-area-height: calc(var(--announcement-bar-is-sticky, 0) * var(--announcement-bar-height, 0px) + var(--header-is-sticky, 0) * var(--header-is-visible, 1) * var(--header-height, 0px));

    /* RTL support */
    --transform-logical-flip: 1;
    --transform-origin-start: left;
    --transform-origin-end: right;

    /**
     * ---------------------------------------------------------------------
     * TYPOGRAPHY
     * ---------------------------------------------------------------------
     */

    /* Font properties */
    --heading-font-family: Jost, sans-serif;
    --heading-font-weight: 400;
    --heading-font-style: normal;
    --heading-text-transform: uppercase;
    --heading-letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    --text-font-family: Poppins, sans-serif;
    --text-font-weight: 300;
    --text-font-style: normal;
    --text-letter-spacing: 0.0em;
    --button-font: var(--text-font-style) var(--text-font-weight) var(--text-sm) / 1.65 var(--text-font-family);
    --button-text-transform: uppercase;
    --button-letter-spacing: 0.18em;

    /* Font sizes */--text-heading-size-factor: 1;
    --text-h1: max(0.6875rem, clamp(1.375rem, 1.146341463414634rem + 0.975609756097561vw, 2rem) * var(--text-heading-size-factor));
    --text-h2: max(0.6875rem, clamp(1.25rem, 1.0670731707317074rem + 0.7804878048780488vw, 1.75rem) * var(--text-heading-size-factor));

  <!-- === CLUB MODA GLOBAL STYLES === -->
  <style>
    /* === PRODUCT IMAGE 9:16 ASPECT RATIO === */
    .product-card__figure,
    .product-card__media {
      aspect-ratio: 9 / 16 !important;
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
      border-radius: 8px;
    }
    .product-card__image {
      width: 100% !important;
      height: 100% !important;
      object-fit: cover !important;
      object-position: center top !important;
      aspect-ratio: 9 / 16 !important;
    }

    /* === PRODUCT IMAGE COLOR ENHANCEMENT === */
    .product-card__image--primary {
      filter: saturate(1.12) contrast(1.04) brightness(1.02);
      transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
    }
    .product-card:hover .product-card__image--primary {
      filter: saturate(1.2) contrast(1.06) brightness(1.04);
      transform: scale(1.04);
    }

    /* === LUXURY PRODUCT CARD STYLING === */
    .product-card {
      position: relative;
      transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .product-card:hover {
      box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
      transform: translateY(-4px);
    }

    /* === QUICK VIEW OVERLAY === */
    .product-card__figure::after {
      content: 'QUICK VIEW';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 14px 0;
      background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(10,10,30,0.7) 0%, transparent 100%);
      color: #fff;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 10px;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 500;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(8px);
      transition: all 0.4s ease;
      z-index: 5;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .product-card:hover .product-card__figure::after {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    /* === PRODUCT TITLE LUXURY === */
    .product-card__title a,
    .product-card__title {
      letter-spacing: 0.3px;
      transition: color 0.3s ease;
    }
    .product-card:hover .product-card__title a,
    .product-card:hover .product-card__title {
      color: #c5a44e !important;
    }

    /* === GOLD SECTION ACCENTS === */
    .section__title::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 60px;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #c5a44e, #e8d48b);
      margin: 10px auto 0;
    }

    /* === PRODUCT PAGE MAIN IMAGE === */
    .product-gallery__image img,
    .product__media img {
      filter: saturate(1.08) contrast(1.03) brightness(1.02);
      border-radius: 6px;
    }

    /* === TRUST SIGNALS BAR === */
    .cm-trust-bar {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 40px;
      padding: 20px 0;
      background: #fafaf8;
      border-top: 1px solid #eee;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .cm-trust-bar__item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      color: #333;
    }
    .cm-trust-bar__icon { font-size: 18px; }

    /* === INSTAGRAM CTA SECTION === */
    .cm-instagram-cta {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 50px 20px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
      color: #fff;
    }
    .cm-instagram-cta h3 {
      font-size: 24px;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-weight: 300;
    }
    .cm-instagram-cta p {
      font-size: 14px;
      opacity: 0.8;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
    }
    .cm-instagram-cta a {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 12px 36px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c5a44e, #e8d48b);
      color: #1a1a2e;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-radius: 4px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }
    .cm-instagram-cta a:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(197,164,78,0.4);
    }

    /* === FREE SHIPPING BANNER (PRE-FOOTER) === */
    .cm-shipping-bar {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 50px;
      padding: 25px 20px;
      background: #fff;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .cm-shipping-bar__item {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #555;
    }
    .cm-shipping-bar__item span {
      display: block;
      font-size: 22px;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }

    /* === MOBILE OPTIMIZATION === */
    @media screen and (max-width: 768px) {
      .product-card:hover {
        transform: translateY(-2px);
        box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
      }
      .product-card:hover .product-card__image--primary {
        transform: scale(1.02);
      }
      .product-card__figure::after {
        display: none;
      }
      .cm-trust-bar {
        gap: 15px;
        padding: 15px 10px;
      }
      .cm-trust-bar__item {
        font-size: 11px;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      .cm-shipping-bar {
        gap: 20px;
      }
      .cm-instagram-cta h3 {
        font-size: 18px;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
      }
      .product-card__figure,
      .product-card__media {
        border-radius: 6px;
      }
    }

    /* === SWIPER/SLIDER LUXURY PAGINATION === */
    .swiper-pagination-bullet {
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
      opacity: 1;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }
    .swiper-pagination-bullet-active {
      background: #c5a44e;
      transform: scale(1.2);
    }
  </style>
